title: Anthropic Sues Trump Admin Over Pentagon 'Risk' Label | Newsmax.com
description: Anthropic is suing the Trump administration, asking federal courts to reverse the Pentagon's decision designating the artificial intelligence company a supply chain risk over its refusal to allow unrestricted military use of its technology.
content:

title: Anthropic sues US government for calling it a risk
description: The artificial intelligence company has been in a public fight with US government leaders over use of its tools like Claude
content:
Artificial intelligence (AI) firm Anthropic has filed a first of its kind lawsuit against the US government over claims that it is a "supply chain risk".

title: Nvidia-backed Nscale valued at $14.6 billion in fresh funding round
description: NVIDIA-backed artificial intelligence (AI) group Nscale was valued at $14.6 billion after raising $2 billion in its latest funding round, the British company said on Monday.
content:
NVIDIA-backed artificial intelligence (AI) group Nscale was valued at $14.6 billion after raising $2 billion in its latest funding round, the British company said on Monday.

title: Agora, FPT partner for AI adoption across Asean banking
description: AGORA, a global leader in real-time engagement and conversational AI technologies, and FPT signed a strategic partnership to expand artificial intelligence (AI) adoption across Southeast Asia’s banking and financial services sector on Feb. 24, 2026.
